location_note: Engine integration fixtures live under crates/engine/tests/fixtures so the coverage gate can load them without production-code dependencies.

policy.classification_semantics: P0 maps final P2 factoring targets, not merely pre-existing single writers. Allowed blocked-record outcomes are proposed_authority, out_of_closure_clone, derived, or blocked.
policy.blocked_policy: blocked is reserved for an uncommandable, external-state, or non-composable semantic mutation. Absence of a current single writer is not blocking evidence.
policy.out_of_closure_policy: A clone/probe write is excluded only with source-read provenance showing creation from canonical state and no path back into it. Non-GameState receiver name collisions remain visible in the site companion but are not P2 reroutes.
policy.composition_policy_requirement: Commands are semantic edits; multi-family fields list provably disjoint scopes and never use whole-container replacement.
policy.ordinary_authority_requirement: proposed_authority names one final P2 seam: an existing owner to promote or a named new function in the recorded owning module.
